message:
test(conformance): add stdlib_numeric, stdlib_sort, spawn_exec conformance harnesses

Adds fixture validation tests for:
- stdlib_numeric: atoi, atol, strtol, strtoul (11 tests)
- stdlib_sort: qsort, bsearch (8 tests)
- spawn_exec_ops: posix_spawn, execve, system (11 tests)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
